subcodes.first_line: By God! That which was concealed behind the veil of grandeur hath been revealed, and that which lay hidden in the knowledge of God, the Lord, hath come to light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تالله قد ظهر ما کان مستورا فی حجاب العظمه و برز ما کان مکنونا فی علم الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @belief and denial, @high station of the true believer
